scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const copyDir=(src,dst,filter)=>{ if(!fs.existsSync(src)) return; fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); for(const name of fs.readdirSync(src)){ const from=path.join(src,name); const to=path.join(dst,name); const stat=fs.statSync(from); if(stat.isDirectory()){ copyDir(from,to,filter); continue; } if(filter && !filter(name,from)) continue; fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(to),{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(from,to); } }; copyDir(path.join(process.cwd(),'scripts'), path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','scripts'), (name)=>name.endsWith('.py')); copyDir(path.join(process.cwd(),'assets'), path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','assets'));"
